features: Launched by the design house of Jo Malone
This chypre fruity fragrance has a blend of pear, melon, rose, rhubarb, amber, musk, patchouli, and fressia notes
It is recommended for daytime wear.
description: Product Description Launched by the design house of Jo Malone. This chypre fruity fragrance has a blend of pear, melon, rose, rhubarb, amber, musk, patchouli, and fressia notes. Ingredients Alcohol Denat., Water\Aqua\Eau, Fragrance (Parfum), Farnesol, Limonene, Geraniol, Linalool, Hexyl Cinnamal, Citronellol, Citral, Bht Directions Spray a small amount on your wrist, behind your ears and on your neck. Use it as one of your favorite Jo Malone products to create a fragrant layer. See more
